schema.description: Optional structured input schema requested from the human.

timeout_seconds.description: Optional approval deadline in seconds (overrides the global HITL timeout).

timeout_default.description: Decision used to resume automatically when the approval deadline expires. Leave empty to fail the run instead.

output_key.description: Optional state key the decision string is written to, so a Router can branch approve → continue / reject → end.

$comment: ports: in:any, out:any (calls interrupt(); requires checkpointer)
